title: thalictrum minus subsp. thunbergii
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. thunbergii, also known as Japanese meadow rue, is a type of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Japanese meadow rue include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
